source.author: SSA Catalog
source.notes: Creamy roasted red pepper sauce for shawarma wraps/bowls; smoky, tangy, and garlicky.

ingredients.label: Roasted red bell peppers (jarred, drained)
notes: If using jarred: drain well and pat dry to prevent a watery sauce.
If roasting fresh: roast 2–3 large red bell peppers, peel, and remove seeds.

ingredients.label: Plain Greek yogurt
notes: Whole-milk preferred for a thicker, richer sauce.

ingredients.label: Mayonnaise
notes: Optional, but adds richness and helps the sauce cling to meat/veg.

ingredients.label: Garlic, grated or pressed
notes: About 2–3 medium cloves; adjust to taste.

ingredients.label: Red wine vinegar
notes: Sub: apple cider vinegar or white vinegar.

ingredients.label: Tomato paste
notes: Optional for deeper color and savory body (about 1 tablespoon).

ingredients.label: Kosher salt
notes: Start with 1/2 teaspoon; adjust after resting.

ingredients.label: Honey
notes: Optional; balances acidity and bitterness (about 1 teaspoon).

ingredients.label: Water (as needed)
notes: Use only if you need to thin to a drizzleable consistency.

steps.title: Drain and prep peppers
instructions: Drain roasted red peppers thoroughly and pat dry with paper towels to avoid a watery sauce.
If using homemade roasted peppers, peel and remove seeds, then cool completely.

steps.title: Blend until smooth
instructions: Add roasted peppers, yogurt, mayonnaise, garlic, lemon juice, vinegar, olive oil, smoked paprika, cumin, optional chili flakes, optional tomato paste, salt, black pepper, and optional honey to a blender or food processor.
Blend until very smooth, scraping down the sides as needed.

steps.title: Adjust texture and balance
instructions: Taste and adjust: add more lemon/vinegar for brightness, more salt for savor, more honey for balance, or more chili for heat.
If the sauce is thicker than you want, blend in water 1 teaspoon (5 ml) at a time until drizzleable.

steps.title: Rest for best flavor
instructions: Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes so flavors meld and garlic mellows.

steps.title: Store
instructions: Store refrigerated in a sealed container.
Best within 3–5 days for freshest flavor; use within 7 days if kept cold.
